meta_title: Contact Us | My Private Clinic — Fulwood, Preston
meta_description: Contact My Private Clinic in Fulwood, Preston. Call, WhatsApp or email Dr Faizal Secretary. Located at Fatima Health Centre, 228 Garstang Road, PR2 9QB.
hero_h1: We're Here When You Need Us
hero_sub: Book an appointment, ask a question, or just find out if we're the right fit for you. We're a phone call or WhatsApp message away.
find_us_text: Fatima Health Centre is located on Garstang Road in Fulwood — a newly built facility with ample parking on site. We are well served by local bus routes and are easily accessible from the surrounding areas of Preston, Fulwood, Broughton, Longridge and the Ribble Valley.
help_text: Not every question needs a formal appointment. Call or WhatsApp us and the doctor will make sure you're pointed in the right direction.
partnership_text: My Private Clinic is based within Fatima Health Centre — a multi-service health and wellbeing facility. We work in collaboration with the other services within the centre to provide a joined-up, holistic approach to your care. If you are a healthcare provider or organisation interested in working with us, we'd love to hear from you.
